name: Dr. Mara Voss
agreeText: This aligns with what our land and people need.
disagreeText: I cannot support a policy that moves us backward.
flavourText: Progress that poisons the soil is no progress at all.

name: Vanguard Jaxx
agreeText: Sound policy. This is how strong nations endure.
disagreeText: Weakness disguised as principle. We will pay for this.
flavourText: A border that can't be defended isn't a border — it's an invitation.

name: Director Chen
agreeText: The data supports this course of action.
disagreeText: The projections on this are not favorable.
flavourText: Every problem has an optimal solution. Finding it is just a matter of data.

name: Sister Calinda
agreeText: The people will feel seen by this decision.
disagreeText: The people bear the costs of choices like this.
flavourText: The people don't need to be managed. They need to be heard.

name: Montgomery Gould
agreeText: Good for business. Good for the nation.
disagreeText: This will cost more than whoever proposed it admits.
flavourText: Tears make excellent lubricant for the textile looms.

name: Commissar Vant
agreeText: The collective will is served. Good.
disagreeText: Private interest has won today. We will remember this.
flavourText: The state is not your enemy. It is your instrument — until the day it no longer needs to be.
